name: libtext-template-perl
title: libtext-template-perl
summary: perl module to process text templates
description:
perl module to process text templates
Text::Template is a library for generating form letters, building
HTML pages, or filling in templates generally. A `template' is a
piece of text that has little Perl programs embedded in it here and
there. When you `fill in' a template, you evaluate the little
programs and replace them with their values.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-template-perl because perl module to process text templates.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-template-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-template-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-template-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
